rationale: The citing paper references Satomura et al. (2014) only once in a grouped literature citation about visual similarity and consumer confusion in brand imitation. It is used as general background support for a broad conceptual point, not as a specific theory, method, metric, or empirical result that the native advertising studies build on. There is no direct reuse of the Copy Alert framework, measures, or modeling approach, and the cited work is not revisited in hypothesis development, testing, or interpretation.
